It can be used in a variety of surgical applications, including socket grafting, GBR, sinus augmentation, and other bone grafting procedures.

name: OraVerse
description:
Click here to see full prescribing information
Local anesthesia reversal agent restores normal sensation to your patients in half the time.1

Can prevent oral hematomas, especially in children and special needs patients.
Great for patients who are uncomfortable with the feeling of numbness, or who need normal sensation returned quickly.

Accelerates the return to normal sensation and function after routine procedures where local anesthetic containing a vasoconstrictor was used. Not recommended for use in children less than 6 years old or weighing less than 15 kg (33 lbs.)
Important safety information: In clinical trials, the most common adverse events with OraVerse (phentolamine mesylate) vs. control were post procedural pain (6% vs. 6%), injection site pain (5% vs. 4%), tachycardia (5% vs. 6%), bradycardia (2% vs. 0.3%) and headache (3% vs. 4%). Following parenteral use of phentolamine in non-dental indications, myocardial infarction and cerebrovascular spasm and occlusion have been reported, usually in association with marked hypotensive episodes producing shock-like states. Although such effects are uncommon with OraVerse, clinicians should be alert to the signs and symptoms of tachycardia and cardiac arrhythmias, particularly in patients with a history of cardiovascular disease, as these symptoms may occur with the use of phentolamine or other alpha-adrenergic blocking agents.
1Hersh EV, Moore PA, Papas AS, and colleagues. Reversal of soft-tissue anesthesia with phentolamine mesylate in adolescents and adults. JADA 2008;139(8):1080-1093. © 2008 American Dental Association. All rights reserved.

name: Safco Articaine
description:
Articaine HCl 4% and epinephrine injection. 1.8ml cartridges.
Product Features:

Indicated for local, infiltrative, or conductive anesthesia in both simple and complex dental procedures.
Rapid onset of anesthesia within 1 – 9 minutes.
Complete anesthesia lasts about 1 hour for infiltrations, up to 2 hours for nerve block.

 
Risk information:
Safco Articaine contains sodium metabisulfite. Safco Articaine is contraindicated in patients who are hypersensitive to products containing sulfites. Products containing sulfites may cause allergic-type reactions including anaphylactic symptoms and life-threatening or less severe asthmatic episodes. Care should be taken to avoid accidental intravascular injection, which may be associated with convulsions followed by coma and respiratory arrest. Local anesthetic solutions that contain a vasoconstrictor should be used cautiously, especially in patients with impaired cardiovascular function or vascular disease. Administration of Safco Articaine results in a 3 to 5 fold increase in plasma epinephrine concentration compared to baseline. However, in healthy adults it does not appear to be associated with marked increases in blood pressure or heart rate, except in the case of accidental intravascular injection. The most common adverse reactions (incidence >2%) are headache and pain. Inform patients in advance of the possibility of temporary loss of sensation and muscle function during infiltration and nerve block injections. Instruct patients not to eat or drink until normal sensation returns.

name: Sure-Check®
description:
Premium autoclave pouches compatible with steam and EtO sterilization methods.
Triple-seal pouches measure and provide clear confirmation that the three internally required sterilization parameters have been met:

contact with saturated steam under pressure,
for the proper length of time,
at the right temperature.

Sure-Check pouches contain both an internal and external multi-parameter indicator, so you don’t need to add a separate indicator to each pouch. When all parameters reach their specified end point, the indicators clearly change from light pink to dark brown. Produced with lead-free inks.
CDC guidelines specify: “Single-parameter internal indicators provide information on only one sterilization parameter and are available for steam, dry heat, and unsaturated chemical vapor. Multiparameter internal indicators measure 2–3 parameters and can provide a more reliable indication that sterilization conditions have been met. Multiparameter internal indicators are only available for steam sterilizers (i.e., autoclaves).”

Strong triple seal eliminates shattering and tearing. Produced with lead-free inks.
Please Note: Unipack has been acquired by Dukal, which means you may see updated branding and packaging. While the name and look have changed, the product itself remains exactly the same in quality, materials, and performance.

name: Young® Core Disposable Prophy Angles
description:
Young® Core Disposable Prophy Angle are used during prophylaxis procedures to remove extrinsic stains, smooth teeth and reduce biofilm providing cost effective performance from the leader in prophy angle technology. The Young Core line features a slim body and reliable design that saves on plastic while maintaining premium feel and durability. The Young Core line also features Young’s signature screw-on cup technology providing superior clinical outcomes for your patients.
The Core Elite Flex features a more flexible cup, for users who like a cup that flexes with the contour of the tooth.
The Contra angle delivers an angled neck for contouring catered to the user's preference.
Made in the USA.

name: Young® Select Disposable Prophy Angles
description: Young® Select Disposable Prophy Angle are used during prophylaxis procedures to remove extrinsic stains, smooth teeth and reduce biofilm providing cost effective performance from the leader in prophy angle technology. Young Select features a slim body design and snap-on cup technology to provide superior clinical outcomes for your patients. Made in the USA.

name: Zooby® Disposable Prophy Angles
description:
Previously distributed by Denticator.
Kids will love picking their favorite animal character. These child-friendly latex-free prophy angles come in an assortment of five zoo favorites: penguins, zebras, tigers, cheetahs, and pink flamingos. Soft, webbed cup. Fits all slow-speed handpieces.

name: Young Contra Disposable Prophy Angles
description: Prophy angles feature a contra bend in the neck that allows your arm to stay in a more relaxed position.

name: Young® Classic Disposable Prophy Angles
description: Each Young disposable prophy angle is lubricated for a reliable, smooth, vibration-free operation.Unlike other brands, Young disposable prophy angles use screw type prophy cups (all other brands use snap-on) to provide a secure fit, smoother rotation, and less quiver.

name: Twist®
description: Prophy angle reciprocates 90° back and forth. Does not rotate, does not build up heat, does not splatter prophy paste. Not made with natural rubber latex.

name: Young Splatter Guard Disposable Prophy Angles
description:
Disposable prophy angles with an innovative new Splatter Guard wiper device engineered to significantly reduce splatter by decreasing the buildup of paste and saliva on the prophy cup.
These prophy angles feature webbed cups and a rounded head for greater clearance and maneuverability in the mouth, plus a slimmer neck design for superior visibility and access. Not made with natural rubber latex.
 
"The splatter Guard is my favorite prophy cup, EVER. I feel that I can remove more bacteria without using a higher grit paste or applying too much pressure to the tooth. I wear black overcoats and it typically highlights the splatter. There is no splatter on my shield or overcoat "
Amber Auger, RDH, MHPAmber is a national speaker, writer and blogger for RDH Magazine and the host of #AskAmberRDH, a weekly Facebook live event.
 
Click here to see a Safer Way to Polish.

name: Vera by Young™ Contra Disposable Prophy Angles
description:
All the unique benefits of the original Vera by Young™ prophy angle, but with a 17° back bend for improved comfort while polishing. The compact prophy angle head and slim neck are designed to deliver better maneuverability in the mouth during polishing.
Contra elite original™ latex-freeSpiral ridges on the inside and outside of the cup provide exceptional stain removal, allow better interproximal cleaning, and reduce splatter.
Contra petite web™ latex-freeUltra-short, 4-webbed cup design for heavy stain and biofilm removal.

name: Young Slim Disposable Prophy Angles
description:
Shorter in length to offer more room to maneuver within tight spaces. Narrow neck and smaller, rounded head design helps improve patient comfort and creates greater visibility for the clinician.

The Elite Original™ latex-free cup features outer ridges/spirals designed for enhanced stain removal and better interproximal cleaning.
The Petite Web™ latex-free cup is short and soft for great flex and flare.

name: Young Classic Pointed Polisher
description: Features a unique pointed tip with outer ridges to remove tough stains. Flexible enough to polish around the brackets and under the wires of orthodontic appliances without damaging tissues. Latex-free.

name: Vera® Splatter Guard Elite™ Disposable Prophy Angles
Twist® Plus
description: 120° oscillating (back-and-forth) motion allows for continuous contact polishing and reduces splatter. The smaller head design improves visibility and increases maneuverability. Not made with natural rubber latex.

name: Unipack prophy angle
description:
New and improved design.
Smaller head and cup size provide better access and visibility. New beveled gears run with less vibration and reduced heat. Latex-free ribbed/webbed cup.

name: Upgrade® (new)
description:
Designed for those seeking a traditional prophy angle feel, this new angle is perfect for everyday use:

90° angle body has a smooth matte finish, with a raised swirl pattern for a secure grip.
Prophy cups are both webbed and ribbed for a familiar flare.
The soft cup features a 10% softer material than the original Upgrade.
Not made with natural rubber latex.

name: Vera by Young™ Disposable Prophy Angles
description:
Young’s innovative latex-free prophy angle design addresses common polishing difficulties for hygienists and patients.Vera stands for Visibility, Ergonomics, Reach and Access, offering:

A slim neck diameter for improved visibility
Ergonomic design for improved patient & clinician comfort 
A rounded head for improved maneuverability
An enhanced grip

Classic elite originalTM - Spiral ridges on the inside and outside of the cup provide exceptional stain removal, allow better interproximal cleaning, and reduce splatter.
Classic petite webTM - Ultra-short, 4-webbed cup design for heavy stain and biofilm removal.

name: Nupro® prophy paste cups
description: A blend of polishing and cleaning agents containing 1.23% fluoride ion provide excellent stain removal. Unique splatter free formula rinses easily and completely. Gluten-free.

name: MI Paste® One Perio
description:
Two-in-one application (toothpaste and treatment) containing RECALDENT™ (CPP-ACP) and stannous fluoride. MI Paste One Perio offers a simple, single step for both treatment and cleaning. Used as a replacement for your current toothpaste, it gives you the same power of MI Paste Plus® but in a single application with the anti-gingivitis benefit of stannous fluoride. Mint flavored.

Hypersensitivity
Tooth erosion and wear
Sensitivity from whitening
Preventing caries and white spot lesions

name: Enamelon®
description:
Treats sensitivity, helps prevent cavities, and relieves the discomfort of dry mouth tissues.*
Relieves sensitivity - Enamelon contains stannous fluoride along with calcium and phosphate ions that block exposed tubules, creating a physical barrier to prevent external stimuli from causing pain or discomfort.
More protection with less fluoride - Enamelon provides more than twice the fluoride uptake of 5000 ppm toothpastes, yet with only 1000 ppm fluoride.
Immediate and long-lasting moisturization and lubrication – Proprietary copolymers provide a long-lasting coating that lubricate and soothe the soft tissues of the mouth. Enamelon is the only over-the-counter (OTC) stannous fluoride preventive treatment gel that has been shown in a clinical trial to help reduce many sensory symptoms of dry mouth.**
Enamelon contains no sodium lauryl sulfate (SLS), and is abrasive-free, gluten-free and dye-free. Great tasting clean mint flavor.
*Data on file at Premier**Milleman J.L., Milleman K.R., Santos S.L., Proskin H.M., Battershell K.K., DiMarino J.C.A. Subjective assessment of Enamelon® Preventive Treatment Gel in A Self-reported Dry-Mouth Population. Compend Contin Educ Dent. 2016;37(8):E6-E10.

name: MI Paste™ Plus (with fluoride)
description: Sugar-free topical paste containing a special blend of polishing, cleaning and dentin tubule sealing agents. The active ingredient Recaldent™ (CPP-ACP) binds bio-available calcium and phosphate ions to tooth surfaces, plaque and surrounding soft tissue. Under acidic conditions, Recaldent™ buffers plaque acid and reduces sensitivity. For use in the dental office or at home to combat demineralization and assist in caries prevention. Contains Xylitol.  Contains 900 ppm fluoride ions (0.2% sodium fluoride); for children 6 years of age and older.

name: 3M™ Clinpro™ Tooth Crème
description:
Non-prescription anti-cavity toothpaste formulated with 0.21% sodium fluoride and functionalized tri-calcium phosphate (fTCP) to help strengthen teeth and reverse white spot lesions. 

Perfect for patients at moderate or high risk of dental cavities.
Cleans and whitens teeth with low abrasion.
Replaces conventional toothpaste regimen.
Vanilla mint flavor.

name: ProMin™ Desensitizing Paste
description:
Contains Calcium Phosphate Ionic Clusters (CPICs), an advanced technology that directly delivers calcium and phosphate ions to the tooth surface. CPICs are engineered to enhance the remineralization process by forming new hydroxyapatite crystals, the natural mineral structure of teeth. This innovative technology mimics the body's natural mineralization processes, providing a more efficient mineral source than traditional technologies.
ProMin F works synergistically with fluoride to strengthen enamel and increase resistance to acid attacks from plaque and dietary sources. The formation of fluorapatite, a more acid-resistant form of hydroxyapatite, is key to this process.
Ideal for patients with poor saliva flow, ProMin F supplies the necessary calcium, phosphate, and fluoride to enhance enamel strength and health. This makes it suitable for a variety of patients, including those with orthodontic appliances, xerostomia (dry mouth), or those experiencing dental sensitivity.

name: 3M™ Clinpro™ 5000 Toothpaste
description:
Prescription-strength 1.1% sodium fluoride dentifrice with tri-calcium phosphate (TCP). Aids in caries prevention, helps strengthen enamel and helps reverse white spot lesions. Provides gentle, yet effective cleaning with a fluoride dosage that is almost 5 times the strength of OTC brands.

Clinically proven extra-strength toothpaste.
Strengthens teeth.
Remineralizes lesions throughout - not just on the surface.
Releases a high level of fluoride plus calcium and phosphate—components found naturally in saliva.
Low abrasion, gentle whitening.
Replaces conventional toothpaste regimen.

name: MI Paste™ (without fluoride)
description:
Sugar-free topical paste containing a special blend of polishing, cleaning and dentin tubule sealing agents. The active ingredient Recaldent™ (CPP-ACP) binds bio-available calcium and phosphate ions to tooth surfaces, plaque and surrounding soft tissue. Under acidic conditions, Recaldent™ buffers plaque acid and reduces sensitivity. For use in the dental office or at home to combat demineralization and assist in caries prevention. Contains Xylitol.

Does not contain fluoride; for children under 6 years of age.

name: MI Paste® ONE
description: Two-in-one application (toothpaste and MI Paste Plus) containing Recaldent™ and fluoride. This product presents another way to treat sensitivity and prevent white spot lesions. Available in two formulations, one for adults and one for children.

name: Arti-Spray
description: Universal marking spray for checking occlusal contacts as well as the accurate fitting of crowns, bridges, dentures and bite splints. Can be precisely dosed and leaves a thin powdery layer of color that can be easily removed with water without leaving any residue.

name: Fit Checker Advanced
description: Next generation, Vinyl Polyether Silicone (VPES) fit checking material. Excellent hydrophilicity ensures saliva no longer affects performance. Minimal film thickness allows detection of high spots and pressure points. Tear resistant but peels away easily and cleanly. Ideal for use in checking crown margins, proximal and occlusal surfaces, precast posts and inlays. Use the blue color for checking fit of all ceramic dental restorations. Pleasant scent and taste.

name: Safco articulating paper
description:
Experience precision and accuracy like never before with Safco Articulating Paper. Our product is specially designed to provide extra sensitivity and correct bite control, allowing for precise occlusion and articulation.
Features and benefits include:

Anatomically shaped and moisture-resistant in various thicknesses for versatile application and optimal results.
Ideal for high spots, occlusion, and articulation, ensuring a perfect fit every time.
Better markings in a wet environment, for reliable and accurate results even in challenging conditions.
Precision film for locating hard-to-find occlusal prematurities, helping you achieve the perfect fit for every patient.

Choose our product for its precision and accuracy, which enables you to achieve successful outcomes in every dental procedure. Our extra-sensitive articulating paper makes it easy to locate even the smallest occlusal prematurities, ensuring a perfect fit and reducing the risk of post-operative discomfort for your patients. Plus, its moisture-resistant design and anatomical shape make it easy to use and apply, while the precision film ensures reliable and consistent results every time. Trust Safco Articulating Paper for the precision and accuracy you need to take your practice to the next level

name: PIP - Pressure Indicating Paste
description: Pressure Indicating Paste (PIP) is a pure white silicone paste, used for seating crowns, bridges and full, immediate and partial dentures. The brief procedure yields specific results that are easy to read and thoroughly reliable, surpassing results obtained with chemical set pressure indicating materials used to locate areas of denture discomfort. PIP is applied to the dry denture; companion PIP spray is applied to the tissue. The denture is then seated under pressure then removed. Areas where the paste has been displaced show points of excessive pressure.

name: Quickcheck indicating spray
description: Accurately discloses unwanted contact points. Non-clogging with a smooth spray that dries instantly.

name: Occlude
description: Aerosol spray for disclosing high spots and contact points. Also perfect for seating crowns. Dries instantaneously; adheres to dry or moist surfaces.

name: Spotit C&B Contact Finder
description:
SpotIt is a more precise alternative to occlusion paper, leaving a clear and accurate indication of adjustments that need to be made for a perfect contact point on crowns and bridges.

Colored contact marker.
Available with straight and angled handles.
Provides easy, exact marking and identification of contact points

name: Hydent
description:
Denture indicator.
Aerosol spray: Applies a thin, uniform layer of paste that clearly defines pressure points. Mint flavor.
Indicator sticks: Color transfer and tissue marking applicators. Blue indicator color.

name: AccuFilm FastCheck
description: Ultra-thin 8 micron articulating paper with a built-in frame that facilitates easy positioning over the occlusal surfaces of posterior teeth without the need for forceps. Double-sided for simultaneous marking of both arches.

name: Shimstock occlusion foil
description: Metal occlusion foil used to accurately detect high spots in any restoration or natural tooth occlusions.

name: TrollFoil articulating foil
description: Premounted, framed foil. Precise registration gives a more accurate picture of patient bite. Fast and convenient dispensing. Frames measure 3" x ¾". Double-sided, and just 8 microns thin.

name: Surgident Disporal articulating paper
description:
Surgident® dispOral™ Articulating Paper from Heraeus

Super sensitive surface for marking at every point of articulation
Non-smudging
Soft
Smooth
Non-sticking

name: Hu-Friedy articulating paper forceps
description: Stainless steel.

name: Dr. Thompson's color transfer applicators
description: Simple and effective method for achieving color transfers from irritated areas under dentures. Applicators are disposable.

name: Safco articulating paper forceps
description:
Easily handle and place articulating paper with Safco Articulating Paper Forceps. Our forceps are specially designed to provide reliable and comfortable grip, ensuring accurate and precise placement of articulating paper every time.
Features and benefits include:

Comfortable grip for easy and accurate placement of articulating paper.
Made from high-quality stainless steel, ensuring durability and long-lasting use.
Serrated tips for improved grip and precision.
Lightweight design for comfortable use during extended dental procedures.

With Safco Articulating Paper Forceps, you can easily and comfortably handle articulating paper, ensuring accurate and precise placement every time. Choose Safco Articulating Paper Forceps for a reliable and comfortable way to handle articulating paper and improve the accuracy of your dental procedures.

name: SmartCem2
description: Self-adhesive, dual-cure resin based cement. Provides excellent retentive and mechanical strengths with low film thickness for high luting strengths. Very low solubility and linear expansion. Up to 2 minutes of working time with a total setting time of 6 minutes. Easy gel-phase cleanup. Contains fluoride. Radiopaque.

name: ZirCAD Cement
description: Radiopaque, self-curing, fluoride releasing, resin-modified glass ionomer luting cement. Tack cure option for easy removal of excess material following light curing. May be used with metal or zirconia crowns and bridges, ceramic inlays, posts, and metal-based inlays and onlays.

name: Tylok-Plus
description: Anhydrous polycarboxylate luting cement. Requires only water for mixing.

name: Ultra-Bond Plus
description: Versatile dual-cure resin cement for bonding of veneers, inlays, onlays and ceramic crowns. Automix syringe delivery.Refrigeration suggested; this product is stored under refrigeration at Safco.

name: RelyX Unicem 2 Automix
description:
Next generation self-adhesive resin cement features enhanced bond strength, mechanical properties, and esthetics. Automix syringe saves time with easy handling and flexible dose dispensing. 
With 3M™ RelyX™ Unicem 2 you get:

Resistant to discoloration.
Moisture-tolerant.
Easy removal of excess cement.
Virtually no post-operative sensitivity.
No etching*, priming or bonding required. 

*Except for 2- or 3-unit Maryland bridges and 3-unit inlay/onlay bridges, which require selective etching to increase surface area for bonding.

name: SpeedCEM Plus
description:
Self-adhesive, self-curing resin cement with a light-curing option. Produces high bond strength on zirconium oxide, base metal alloys (e.g. titanium) and on dentin without light-activation. Suited for cementing restorations made of zirconium oxide and metal ceramics, and the cementation of restorations on implant abutments. Easy clean-up of excess material. Radiopaque.
Refrigeration required; this product is stored under refrigeration at Safco.

name: Variolink Esthetic
description:
Esthetic cementation made simple. A light and dual-curing luting composite for the esthetic and permanent cementation of demanding ceramic and composite resin restorations.
Its combination of exceptional esthetics and user-friendly shade matching ensures excellent clinical results in every case.

Exceptional handling and easy clean-up
Amine-free for long-term shade stability
Reliable bond strength results with a universal, easy to use bonding system

Even when exposed to intensive light or a humid environment, Variolink Esthetic is not subject to visible shade changes. Its lifelike fluorescence is similar to that of natural teeth. Very resistant to wear, ensuring good marginal quality of the restoration while in place.

name: RelyX Veneer
description:
Veneer cement that is simple to dispense, apply and seat. 

Ideal viscosity keeps veneers in position after placement.
Light-cure only system provides excellent color stability.
Easy clean-up.
Try-in pastes are water-soluble and offer excellent color match to final cured cement.

name: RelyX Unicem Maxicap
description:
Dual cure self-adhesive universal resin cement. Eliminates the need for etching*, priming, and bonding steps. Provides high physical strength, low linear expansion, and excellent marginal integrity.
Maxicap™ capsule delivery is ideal for multi-unit bridges. The hygienic unidose (936mg) capsule provides a consistent mix with triturator. 2’ 30” working time. Requires a Maxicap™ activator (blue base) and applier (blue button).
*Except for 2- or 3-unit Maryland bridges and 3-unit inlay/onlay bridges, which require selective etching to increase surface area for bonding.

name: 3M™ RelyX™ Universal Resin Cement
description:
Universal dual-cure resin cement for virtually all adhesives and self-adhesive indications. Works great as a standalone, self-adhesive cement, plus further enhanced bond strength to all substrates when combined with 3M Scotchbond Universal Plus Adhesive. Covers virtually all resin cement indications including veneers, inlays and onlays, crowns, bridges, posts and screws.
Excellent bond strength.

High esthetics by color-stable, fluorescent shades.
Easy clean-up.
Unique self-sealing automix syringe with exclusive micro mixing tips minimizes cement waste by 80% over other automix tips* - you get 15 applications** from one 3.4g syringe!

*per application compared to currently available standard automix systems.**on average

name: Riva Cem Automix
description:
Self-curing, radiopaque, fluoride releasing paste/paste resin modified glass-ionomer luting cement. Features ionglass™ technology, a unique blend of different sized reative glass particles that harnesses ion-release to cross-link polycarboxylic acid chains. This focused ion release results in a higher bond strength and more stable aesthetic properties.

Light tack cure option for easy removal of excess paste.
High flexural strength.
High bond strength to enamel and dentine.
BPA free.
Sustained fluoride release.
Light yellow shade.
More tips with less waste than other cements.

name: SoloCem
description:
Dual-cure, self-adhesive resin cement with antibacterial zinc oxide that ensures reliable, tight restoration, in concert with a particularly low level of shrinkage.
SoloCem offers:

Antibacterial zinc oxide.
Time-saving, simplified handling.
Low shrinkage.
High adhesion values.

Indicated for a broad range of procedures including crowns and bridges, root posts, inlays and onlays, as well as implant abutments.

name: ZR-Cem
description: Dual-cure, self-etch, self-adhesive universal resin cement specifically formulated for zirconia restorations. Optimal viscosity and easy handling enables a strong bond to all ceramic materials, dentin and enamel. Virtually no post-operative sensitivity. Strong color stability in the mouth over time.

name: Set PP
description:
Self-etch, self-adhesive, dual-cure resin cement for final cementation of metal, resin and ceramic based restorations such as inlays, crowns and bridges; also indicated for use with pins, posts and screws. No Bisphenol A or HEMA. High fluoride release. Radiopaque.
Refrigeration suggested; this product is stored under refrigeration at Safco.

name: Secure
Brilliant Bulk Fill Flow
description:
New filling material in the Coltene Brilliant family for quick and easy posterior restorations. Based on the BRILLIANT filling technology, Bulk Fill Flow is characterized by its reliable: One Multi-Shade which adapts effortlessly to a variety of tooth shades thanks to its chameleon effect, 4mm curing depth, high flexural strength and low shrinkage. Excellent abrasion resistance and no capping layer needed.  

One adaptive Multi-Shade material.
4mm reliable curing depth polymerized in 20 seconds.
No top layer needed due to high abrasion resistance and good mechanical properties.
Adapts to a wide range of tooth shades due to its chameleon effect.

name: Virtuoso Flowable
description: Light-cured, low viscosity resin composite with smooth, easy handling characteristics. Ideal problem solver for small restorations with difficult access, reaching the proximal box of Class II restorations, or for repairing margins and adding to provisionals. Contains fluoride.

name: SDR Flow+
Venus Bulk Flow One
description: Flowable one shade bulk fill composite that can be used in up to 4mm increments without an additional capping layer. Blends seamlessly into the surrounding dentition, independent of tooth shade. High radiopacity, low shrinkage stress, high flexural strength and wear resistance.

name: Stela
description:
Stela is the ultimate high-performance self-cure flowable composite and the ideal restorative for Classes I, II, III, and V. Stela Primer contains a catalyst that initiates the curing process at the restoration interface and not from the occlusal surface like traditional light curing processes. This polymerization sequence mitigates stress to enable a gap-free interface, reducing post operative sensitivity and the risk of premature failure.
Stela is applied in a simplified two-step process; primer, then composite. Stela restorations are ready for placement in just 15 seconds. This is achieved by eliminating traditional steps of etch, prime, bond, and light cure, ultimately reducing patient in-chair time.
Stela is available in a single shade with chameleon capabilities to blend in with surrounding dentition. The composite contains fluoride, calcium, and strontium, and is free of BPAs and HEMA.

Gap free
Unlimited depth of cure
Simple 2 step system, just prime and fill.
No photo-cure required
One shade
High strength
Outstanding radiopacity

For additional information, click here.
For Instructions for Use, click here.

name: Solventum™ Filtek™ Easy Match Flowable Restorative
description:
Three shades, intuitive shade selection and virtually no bubbles. Solventum™ Filtek™ Easy Match Flowable Restorative is a three-shade system that simplifies anterior and posterior restorations. Its naturally-adaptive opacity provides enamel-like translucency where you need it and dentin-like opacity everywhere else, without the need for a blocker. Use on its own or pair with 3M™ Filtek™ Easy Match Universal Restorative. The Bright, Natural and Warm shades provide an excellent shade match to most patients’ smiles.
Simple and intuitive shade selection for anterior and posterior restorations.Just three shades match 3M™ Filtek™ Easy Match Universal Restorative — and provide an excellent shade match to the classical VITA shade guide.Naturally-adaptive opacity provides enamel-like translucency on the bevel and incisal edge, and dentin-like opacity everywhere else — without needing a blocker.Virtually no bubbles or material run-on.Made with Filtek’s TRUE nanotechnology for excellent polish retention and wear resistance.Offers excellent adaptation for a range of indications and techniques.Simplified and streamlined inventory; reduces waste for infrequently used shades.Easy-to-bend cannula for precise placement.Ergonomic plunger design is easy to hold and dispense.Can be warmed up to 70°C/158°F for up to one hour and up to 25 times with the Solventum™ Filtek™ Composite Warmer.

name: Tetric EvoFlow® Bulk Fill
description:
Bulk fill version of Tetric EvoFlow. Can be placed in 4mm increments and cured in just 10 seconds. Self-adapts to the prep to eliminate gaps and provides a level base for the subsequent sculptable composite layer. 
Available in 3 shades:

IVA – between A2 and A3
IVB – between B1 and B2
IVW – whitish; e.g. deciduous teeth

The manufacturer has notified Safco as of December 1, Tetric EvoFlow Bulk Fill has transitioned to Tetric PowerFlow.

name: Vertise Flow
description: Self-adhering, light-cured, resin-based flowable composite restorative. Greatly simplifies the direct placement procedure by incorporating the bonding agent into the composite material. Creates both a chemical bond and a micromechanical inter-penetrating network between polymerized monomers and collagen fibers, including the smear layer of dentin. Acid-resistant zone between the composite and dentin ensures a long-lasting bond.Refrigeration required; this product is stored under refrigeration at Safco.

name: Venus Diamond Flow
description:
Light-cured, nano-technology flowable composite that offers high radiopacity, low shrinkage and high flexural strength. Use as a base/liner, pit and fissure sealant, for Class V restoration, and minimally invasive Class I, II and III restorations.
Pure shades cover up to 90% of anterior and posterior restorations, simplifying restorations and saving chair time.

name: StartFlow
description: Light-cured micro-hybrid flowable resin. Sub-micron particle size for superior polishability. Radiopaque and fluoride releasing. Natural fluorescence.

name: TPH Spectra ST Flow
description:
Flowable composite with SphereTEC filler technology brings enhanced simplicity and versatility to traditional flowable indications.

Excellent chameleon blending ability enables 5 shades to cover the full VITA range.
Flow on-demand handling provides optimum versatility.
High strength, polish, and stain resistance.

name: Venus Flow
description: Flowable, light-cured, hybrid composite containing 62% filler by weight. It is indicated for use as a base/liner, pit and fissure sealant, for Class V restoration, and minimally invasive Class I, II, and III restorations.

name: Tetric PowerFlow
description:
Tetric® PowerFlow is a nano hybrid, flowable, posterior 4-mm composite with all the benefits of Ivocerin.
When used with Bluephase® PowerCure curing light, and Adhese Universal® adhesive, Tetric® PowerFill sculptable universal and Tetric® PowerFlow composite will cure in just 3 seconds. When used with any other curing light with an intensity of 1000mW/cm2, curing time is 10 seconds.

name: Wave
description: A light-cured, flowable composite appropriate for both Class III and V, and small Class I and II lesions. The low viscosity formula allows adaptation onto all surfaces and can be placed intraorally directly from the syringe through a disposable applicator tip. Improved radiopacity and fluoride releasing.

name: Tetric EvoFlow
description: A light-cured, nano-optimized flowable composite that provides higher radiopacity, lower shrinkage and lower wear. Perfect for use as a liner or initial layer under all composite materials. Also suitable for preventive resin restorations and the adhesive cementation technique. New ergonomic syringe and new Cavifil design feature extra-thin tips for precision application.

name: TPH Spectra ST
description:
Universal composite restorative material indicated for anterior and posterior restorations of all cavity classes. It offers excellent physical properties, brilliant polish and clinical longevity.The new formula combines the proven and trusted performance of TPH Spectra resin with innovative SphereTEC™ (ST) filler technology. This technology has further optimized handling that is non-sticky with improved sculptability and slump resistance. It has a simplified shading system covering the full VITA range with just five shades, and enhanced durability and speed of polish, all while maintaining excellent stain resistance.Available in 2 viscosities:LV (Low Viscosity) – creamy, spreadable consistencyHV (High Viscosity) – firmer and more packable.
With TPH Spectra ST, you only need 5 shades to cover the entire 16-shade VITA® range:



 TPH Spectra ST shade
VITA shade coverage


A1
A1, B1, C1


A2
A2, B2, D2

A3, C2, D3, D4


A3.5
A3.5, B3, B4, C3


A4
A4, C4

name: Tetric EvoCeram Aligner
description:
High quality, sculptable fluorescent composite for use with clear aligners.
• Optimized fluorescence for higher visibility of attachments. • Supports the exact initial placement and easy removal of attachments.• Pronounced chameleon effect ensures a natural shade blend.• Stable and abrasion resistant.• Can be used for all orthodontic clear aligner therapy and for the fixation of lingual retainers.

name: Synergy Nano Formula
description: Refractive resin matrix creates a restoration that blends into the surrounding tooth structure. Each Duo shade covers 2 Vita shades providing easier shade selection.

name: Venus Diamond One
description:
Single-shaded composite that blends seamlessly into the surrounding dentition, independent of the tooth shade, enabling restorations to simply disappear. The shade of the restoration is determined by the absorption of the "light waves" that are reflected by the surrounding tooth shade. For use in both anterior and posterior restorations.
• Firm, low-stick consistency.• Offers non-slump qualities for easy carving and sculpting.• Long-lasting due to the unique TCD-matrix for chip and fracture resistance.• Entirely free of BIS-GMA and BPA related monomers.

name: TPH Spectra ST Effects
description: Works with the 5 universal shades of TPH Spectra ST in a simplified layering approach to achieve reliable high-end results in esthetically demanding anterior composite cases.

name: ZNano
description:
Universal nanocomposite that simplifies the color-matching process.

5 adaptive shades that blend easily to a patient’s existing tooth color.
Life-like fluorescence and high polishability.
Superior physical properties and stain resistance.
Non-stick handling.

name: Venus Pearl One
description:
Single-shaded composite that blends seamlessly into the surrounding dentition, independent of the tooth shade, enabling restorations to simply disappear. The shade of the restoration is determined by the absorption of the "light waves" that are reflected by the surrounding tooth shade. For use in both anterior and posterior restorations.

Creamy, low-stick consistency.
Offers non-slumping qualities for easy carving and sculpting.
Long-lasting due to the unique TCD-matrix for chip and fracture resistance.
Entirely free of BIS-GMA and BPA related monomers.

name: 3S PowerCure System
description:
Comprised of four coordinated products designed to work together for maximum efficiency and positive outcomes:

Bluephase® PowerCure curing light.
Tetric® PowerFill sculptable universal composite.
Tetric® PowerFlow flowable composite.
Adhese Universal® adhesive.

When used together, the composites and adhesive will cure in just 3 seconds. When used with any other curing light with an intensity of 1000mW/cm2, curing time is 10 seconds.

name: Tetric EvoCeram
description:
Nano-optimized composite restorative. The unique combination of nano technologies in Tetric EvoCeram enables you to easily create natural-looking, single shade restorations:


Nano-fillers provide smoother surfaces for faster and easier high-gloss polishability, lower wear for long-lasting restorations, low shrinkage (<1.6% for better marginal integrity), and a high level of radiopacity for easy x-ray detection.
Nano-modifiers layered within the resin matrix create more efficient handling properties and a more sculptable, non-slump, non-sticky consistency.
Nano-sized color pigments are finely distributed within the resin matrix, intensifying color nuances.


Plus, a new additive makes Tetric EvoCeram even less sensitive to ambient light and more reactive to curing lights. You get more time to model and sculpt, then a fast 10 second curing time at 1000mW/cm2.

name: Synergy D6
description: Nano-filled hybrid resin restorative material. Six dentin shades were created by grouping Vita shades with similar hue, chroma and value; these shades are then refined to enhance chroma and translucency, resulting in a simplified shade selection. Additional features include low shrinkage values and optimized abrasive resistance.

name: Venus Pearl
description:
Universal nano-hybrid composite indicated for all classes of anterior and posterior restorations, direct composite veneers, core build-up or porcelain repairs.
The innovative formula, based on the urethane monomer chemistry of Venus Diamond, possesses superior physical properties such as low shrinkage stress and high flexural strength. The creamy consistency allows for easy and convenient handling, excellent sculptability, and superb polishability. The wide range of shades provides excellent color adaptation through a single or multiple layer technique for beautiful, long-lasting, esthetic results.
Pure shades match anterior and posterior restorations effortlessly while simplifying the workflow.

name: Tetric PowerFill
description:
Tetric® PowerFill is a sculptable, nano hybrid posterior 4mm composite, with an upgraded chemistry and a new chain-transfer agent, Ivocerin, which enables esthetic increments that feature an enamel and dentin like translucency and a reliable depth of cure with faster polymerization.
When used with Bluephase® PowerCure curing light, and Adhese Universal® adhesive, Tetric PowerFill sculptable universal and Tetric PowerFlow composite will cure in just 3 seconds. When used with any other curing light with an intensity of 1000mW/cm2, curing time is 10 seconds.

name: Venus Diamond
description:
Nano-hybrid composite with a patented matrix structure combines extremely high durability with minimal shrinkage for use in all Class I – V restorations.Just one layer provides exceptional results for simple restorations. Multiple layers allow you to duplicate natural tooth anatomy. Extended working time, even under operating lights, for more efficient sculpting.
Pure shades match anterior and posterior restorations effortlessly while simplifying the workflow.

name: Surefil One™
description:
Dentsply has halted production of Surefil One. We do not have an estimate of when it will be available.Bulk fill hybrid composite combines the durability and esthetics of resin with the fluoride-releasing protection of a glass ionomer.

   Self-adhesive: no etching, bonding or conditioning needed.
   Dual-cure initiators allow filling to any depth without layering.
   Clinical testing shows less than 1% incidence of post-operative sensitivity.
   Convincing esthetics – five esthetic shades available.
   Fluoride releasing for added security.

These powder-liquid capsules require trituration for mixing and a capsule extruder for dispensing.

name: Tetric Prime
description: Sculptable universal composite for anterior and posterior restorations. Smooth, creamy handling for flawless adaptation and contouring. Twelve streamlined shades with outstanding chameleon effect to maximize esthethics. High radiopacity and extended working time to allow the dentist easy diagnosis and adequate time to place.

name: Wizard Matrix Wedges
description: Achieve accurate, stable restorations with Wizard Wedges, designed to improve access and secure matrix systems during critical dental procedures. Crafted from high-quality birchwood, these wedges provide effective tooth separation and support faster, natural tooth repositioning after removal.

name: Composi-Tight® 3D Fusion Wedge™
description:
3D Fusion Wedges fuse two materials together to produce the perfect combination of adaptability and retention.

Soft-Face technology, where a soft, rubberized material is fused to the firm plastic core, allows the wedge to gently mold itself to root irregularities for an optimal seal.
Soft retentive fins along the gingival edges fold in smoothly during wedge insertion and spring back when clear of the interproximal space – firmly locking 3D Fusion in place.
Most predictable restorations, regardless of your preferred matrix system

name: Supermat® Matrix System
description: Retainerless matrix system designed for use in large posterior restorations. The SuperMat system includes ringed SuperCap matrices in clear plastic and stainless steel, along with a SuperLock tensioning instrument securing a perfect interproximal contact. After tightening, the tensioning instrument is removed from the mouth for ease in filling several teeth in the same quadrant.

name: WedgeWands®
description:
Garrison has taken another step forward in improving the ease to achieve tight, natural contacts. The anatomical, adaptable WedgeWands® were created from a "wish list" of performance features collected from dentists.
WedgeWands® are a simple, straight-forward solution to the difficult task of achieving proper seal and separation during dental procedures.

The wand applicator provides the simplest placement technique ever
The most anatomical shape available
Patient-friendly features to reduce trauma to the papilla

name: Wizard Matrix Wedges Anatomical
description: Waterpik Anatomical Wizard Wedges are designed to provide a secure fit and optimal tooth separation during restorative procedures. Their anatomical shape adapts naturally to tooth contours, helping ensure tight interproximal contact and reduced overhangs. Made for easy placement and stability, these wedges support accurate matrix band positioning and improved clinical outcomes.

name: Barmans Wooden Wedges
description:
Barman’s Wooden Wedges achieve better and safer procedures thanks to its anatomical shape. The role of the wedge is to attach the matrices to their correct position and to achieve a better separation from the adjacent tooth. The wedge is progressively thicker from the pointed end making the wedge fit most spaces. Made of soft and pliable birch wood.
The Barman’s Easy Grip Wedges special design provides firm holding and easy, safe insertion. The rounded base of the tip provides smooth inserting between teeth.  The shaped sides conform to interdental space to provide optimal and uniformed lateral pressure on the matrix band.

name: SafeMatrix® Clear Contour
description:
Pre-assembled, easy-to-use, contoured disposable matrix bands with a clear Mylar band.
Added benefit of Mylar band:

Facilitates curing light penetration.
Increased visibility of composite.
Simplifies approximal and interdental filling reconstruction.

name: Rainbow Wedges™
description: Anatomically contoured, strong wooden wedges that come in in four color coded sizes. Designed to avoid laceration of gingival tissue.

name: A+ Wedge™
description:
The A+ Wedge controls gingival bleeding making restorations cleaner and quicker. In addition to adapting naturally to the contours of the teeth and mimicking interproximal anatomy, the wedges are coated with aluminum sulfate that has an astringent effect on the gingiva. The wedges are designed to prevent back-out and are long enough to allow for proper matrix ring placement.

Controls gingival bleeding.
Improves clarity of restoration area.
Eliminates need to apply an astringent separately.

name: Strata-G™
description:
The Strata-G system offers adaptability and consistency during restorations. They are built to handle wide preps, deeper margins, and primary teeth with less flash and finishing time.

Nitinol drawn-wire nickel titanium aligned for superior performance.
Easy to open.
Marginal ridge enhancements.
Combines with Strata-G rings, band, and wedges for a 270° seal.
The rings won’t spring off the tooth.
Wide Preparation rings make difficult wide preps easier.
The inverted V shape sits lower and seals deeper interproximally.
Flexible side walls and Soft-Face TPE over-mold work together so Strata-G Wedges can adapt to concavities and irregularities.

name: VeneerNow™ Injectable Matrix System
description:
The ideal solution for creating chair-side attractive, natural-looking veneers and anterior restorations. Designed for ease of use, it enables composite injection with minimal clean-up, streamlining your workflow and ensuring fast, predictable results.
Features:

Anatomical design: Replicates natural tooth shape for superior results.
Side wings: Enhance stability & minimizes interproximal clean-up.
Closed system matrix: Provides a void-free smooth composite layer.
Natural cervical line: For a precise anatomical emergence profile.
Versatile: Use with flowable or packable composite.

name: G-Wedge™
description:
If you prefer traditional wedge placement with either a hemostat or cotton pliers, G-Wedge™ gives you the same basic wedge shape as the Wedge Wands® without the applicator wand.

Secure gripping block for positive control
Improved safety tip to prevent digging into the papilla
The most anatomical shape available
Patient-friendly features to reduce trauma to the papilla

name: SafeMatrix™
description:
Pre-assembled, easy-to-use, single-use bands create a smooth external surface against which restorative material can be packed.

Push-button diverter creates band angulation to ensure tight interproximal contact.
Narrow neck and rounded edges provide easy access and visibility.
Can be used with all restorative materials as well as with wedges and rubber dam.

name: Sycamore Wedges
description:
Anatomically carved wooden wedges. Rounded tip easily passes over gingiva; concave side conforms matrix band to the anatomy of the tooth.

 
Notes on wedge sizes:

Sizes are listed in ascending order (Mini is the smallest and 17 is the largest).
The wedge number designates length in millimeters (13 = 13mm).

name: Directa Dental FenderWedge®
description:
Bur damage to adjacent teeth is a common problem in everyday dental practice. Research shows that 70% of adjacent teeth suffer damage during class II preparations.* FenderWedge prevents damage to the adjacent tooth and gingiva that commonly occurs during Class II preparations. FenderWedge is a combination of a steel plate and a plastic wedge that facilitates easy application of a matrix. To avoid aspiration it is recommended to secure FenderWedge with a waxed dental floss. 

Confident Preparations
Protects adjacent tooth
Pre-Separation
Protects gingiva

Uses a specially synthesized version of the natural rubber without the potential allergen of latex proteins.
Formulated to optimize exceptional strength and stretch.
Violet color  provides increased contrast to the tooth for better dental photography.

description: Soft dental dam napkins serve as a barrier between dam and sensitive skin. Available to fit standard frame size, or larger size for use with strap-holder. Non-woven fabric absorbs water, perspiration, and saliva.
